name: ClaudeForge
description: Automated CLAUDE.md file creation, enhancement, and maintenance for Claude Code projects. Includes a claudeforge-skill, /enhance-claude-md slash command, and a Guardian background agent. Uses SessionStart lifecycle hooks for auto-update checks. Version 2.0 supports modern permissions syntax and hot-reload.
